milestone_brief: Sprint 0 of the 2026q2-graph-and-window uplift — bundle three XS-effort RICE-12.0 candidates from .claude/notes/frontend-uplifts/2026q2-graph-and-window/artifacts/final-report.md into a single milestone. All three are challenger-NONE. Scope: UPL-9 (app.py — add ambient=0.15, diffuse=0.85 to plotter.add_mesh); UPL-27 (render-panel-chrome.py — wrap each panel in a bare QDockWidget before grabbing; AI-3 still respected, bare QDockWidget outside QMainWindow does not host QtInteractor); UPL-28 (render-panel-chrome.py + agent-prompts.md visual-scout template — add p.set_background('#2f2f2f') to off-screen render template + clearFocus() before panel grab). AI invariants to respect: AI-3 (no MainWindow under QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen), AI-11 (qualified Qt enums), AI-13 (6-digit hex). Validation: .venv/bin/python .claude/scripts/frontend-uplift/render-panel-chrome.py /tmp/verify produces dock-bar-inclusive PNGs with integrity check passing.
research_synthesis: Solo Sonnet researcher confirmed three additive XS-effort changes with no AI-N conflicts: UPL-9 adds ambient=0.15, diffuse=0.85 to app.py:374 (primary add_mesh call; do NOT touch the lighting=False overlay at line 383); UPL-28 adds p.set_background('#2f2f2f') to agent-prompts.md:43 visual-scout template + widget.clearFocus() (NOT setFocusPolicy — children still tab-cycle) in render-panel-chrome.py _grab(); UPL-27 wraps each panel in a bare QDockWidget (production dock titles: Appearance/View/Parameters) before calling _grab(), AI-3 explicitly cleared by the clarifying paragraph for bare QDockWidget outside QMainWindow. Sequencing UPL-9 -> UPL-28 -> UPL-27 (per researcher's recommendation since UPL-27 and UPL-28 both touch _grab call sites).
